findings.summary: Uncaught JobOwnershipLostError inside runClaimedJob's catch block when queue.releaseClaim, queue.markFailed, or queue.markCancelled is called.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap queue.releaseClaim, queue.markCancelled, and queue.markFailed calls inside the catch block with try/catch to gracefully ignore JobOwnershipLostError.

findings.summary: Uncaught JobOwnershipLostError in defaultWorkerLoop when calling jobQueue.markFailed and jobQueue.markRunning.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap jobQueue.markFailed and jobQueue.markRunning with try/catch to ignore JobOwnershipLostError.

findings.summary: Uncaught JobOwnershipLostError when calling queue.releaseClaim on signal abort.
findings.suggested_fix: Wrap queue.releaseClaim with try/catch to ignore JobOwnershipLostError.
